use_cases: Displaying success confirmations after form submissions or completed actions
Showing error messages for validation failures or system errors
Presenting warning notifications for important user attention items
Delivering informational alerts for system updates or tips
Providing dismissible status messages within application dashboards
ai_summary: A lightweight animated alert component for displaying contextual feedback messages with color-coded types (success, error, warning, info). Features subtle entrance animations and interactive hover/tap effects using Framer Motion. Designed for universal use across SaaS, e-commerce, and healthcare applications requiring user notifications.
